title: BERU Risk Summary
description: Structured output format for CISO-ready risk summaries generated by BERU. Used by GP-API /api/beru/triage and /api/beru/summarize endpoints.

severity_context.description: Scanner severity + environmental context (e.g., 'HIGH in production VPC with PII workloads')

blast_radius.description: Affected systems, data exposure, lateral movement potential

immediate_action.description: Specific commands or config changes. Never 'investigate further' without details.

remediation.description: Full remediation steps beyond immediate containment

nist_controls.description: Mapped NIST 800-53 control IDs (e.g., SI-4, IR-4, AC-6)

confidence.description: Model confidence in this triage decision

ciso_summary.description: Executive-ready narrative — business impact language, no raw technical jargon

finding_type.description: Scanner-specific finding type or rule ID

raw_output.description: Original scanner output for audit trail
